channel.title: Eleanora — the Journal
channel.description: An archive of her stories. New ones, as they land.

item.title: I Think I've Been Collecting Portals
item.description: Small confession. I have a thing for doors. Old ones. The heavy wooden kind with the paint peeling off. I have hundreds of them. What if I was never photographing doors at all — but little portals, asking each one the same quiet thing.

item.title: The Thing We Keep Running From
item.description: The world runs on two speeds. Routine, which it calls living. Complacency, which it calls comfort. I found the third thing in Italy.

item.title: Drowning, but in Croatia
item.description: I quit my job to come here, looking for a sign. And boy, did I find one — the first thing this country said to me, scrawled across a wall.

item.title: The Good Girl (who was already gone)
item.description: I made my Confirmation the year I decided to leave. The story of the good girl who was already gone, and the map she built out of her own life.

item.title: The Girl Behind the Camera (but also in front)
item.description: I'll start with a confession. You've seen me somewhere before. You just can't place it. The whole story, from the girl who wanted to be someone to the one still searching for home.
